gist.headline: Grokking the Canvas
gist.blurb: The hive just got smarter—xAI's Grok-Imagine model is now available for your pixel-generating pleasure.
gist.summary: Integrated the Grok-Imagine image generation model (alpha) via the Airforce API.
gist.impact: Users can now select 'grok-imagine' to generate high-quality images with xAI's latest visual capabilities.
gist.visual_concept: Polly and the Robot discovering a new futuristic painting tool. The 'X' motif represents xAI/Grok, integrated into a cozy art studio setting.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee and the chunky robot mascot in a warm art studio, looking at a canvas showing a starry galaxy with a subtle 'X'. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Polly wears a tiny artist beret and the robot holds a glowing brush. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Pixel text on easel: 'GROK'. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
